creator: tj+freebsd_ports@a13.fr
text:
Thanks for the last exp-run and changes to RubyGems upstream, that's
great news.

  I noticed the patch fails to apply again following two ports updates:

    sysutils/rubygem-bolt/files/patch-bolt.gemspec
    sysutils/rubygem-r10k/files/patch-r10k.gemspec

  Should I update the patch now, or wait for approval of the patch
currently attached to the PR?
